smart__PlanDefinition__CareAndTreatmentClinicalVisit_PlanDefinition__elements__descriptionTo initiate ART and to provide HIV care, treatment and integrated health services

smart__PlanDefinition__HIV_A_Registration_PlanDefinition__elements__namePlanDefinition_HIV.A. Registration
smart__PlanDefinition__HIV_A_Registration_PlanDefinition__elements__titlePlanDefinition - HIV.A. Registration
smart__PlanDefinition__HIV_A_Registration_PlanDefinition__elements__descriptionTo ensure client is found in the record system and personal details are updated or, if not located, entered into the system to be put into a queue awaiting counselling.
smart__PlanDefinition__HIV_A_Registration_PlanDefinition__elements__statusactive

smart__PlanDefinition__HIV_Testing_PlanDefinition__url__canonicalhttp://smart.who.int/hiv/PlanDefinition/HIV-Testing-PlanDefinition
smart__PlanDefinition__HIV_Testing_PlanDefinition__url__pagePlanDefinition-HIV-Testing-PlanDefinition.html
smart__PlanDefinition__HIV_Testing_PlanDefinition__url__jsonPlanDefinition-HIV-Testing-PlanDefinition.json
smart__PlanDefinition__HIV_Testing_PlanDefinition__url__xmlPlanDefinition-HIV-Testing-PlanDefinition.xml
smart__PlanDefinition__HIV_Testing_PlanDefinition__url__ttlPlanDefinition-HIV-Testing-PlanDefinition.ttl
smart__PlanDefinition__HIV_Testing_PlanDefinition__text__displayPlanDefinition - HiV Testing
smart__PlanDefinition__HIV_Testing_PlanDefinition__link__html<a href="PlanDefinition-HIV-Testing-PlanDefinition.html">PlanDefinition - HiV Testing</a>
smart__PlanDefinition__HIV_Testing_PlanDefinition__elements__namePlanDefinition_HIV_Testing
smart__PlanDefinition__HIV_Testing_PlanDefinition__elements__titlePlanDefinition - HiV Testing
smart__PlanDefinition__HIV_Testing_PlanDefinition__elements__descriptionTo diagnose individuals with HIV and facilitate their engagement in care and ART as early as possible, as well as to counsel HIV-negative clients and link them to prevention and other services
smart__PlanDefinition__HIV_Testing_PlanDefinition__elements__statusactive

smart__PlanDefinition__PrEP_visit_PlanDefinition__elements__descriptionTo provide the client with PrEP as a prevention choice for people at elevated risk for HIV acquisition, as part of a combination of HIV prevention approaches, and during a clinic visit. Fig. 10 shows the flow of the PrEP visit proces

smart__ValueSet__HIV_A_DE43__elements__nameHIVADE43
smart__ValueSet__HIV_A_DE43__elements__titleAdministrative Area ValueSet
smart__ValueSet__HIV_A_DE43__elements__descriptionValue set of this should be a context-specific list of administrative areas, such as villages, districts, etc. The purpose of this data element is to allow for grouping and flagging of client data to a particular facility's catchment area. This can be input into the system by the end user OR it can be automated in the database based on the end user's attributes.

smart__ValueSet__HIV_C_DE107__text__displaySex factor for estimating creatinine clearance ValueSet
smart__ValueSet__HIV_C_DE107__link__html<a href="ValueSet-HIV.C.DE107.html">Sex factor for estimating creatinine clearance ValueSet</a>
smart__ValueSet__HIV_C_DE107__elements__nameHIVCDE107
smart__ValueSet__HIV_C_DE107__elements__titleSex factor for estimating creatinine clearance ValueSet
smart__ValueSet__HIV_C_DE107__elements__descriptionValue set of value used for gender for calculating creatinine clearance if required. For transgender populations, the sex at birth is used in the Cockcroft-Gault equation if the person is not using hormone therapy; among transgender populations using hormone therapy for more than three months, the current gender can be used.
smart__ValueSet__HIV_C_DE107__elements__statusactive
smart__ValueSet__HIV_C_DE107__elements__version0.4.4
smart__ValueSet__HIV_C_DE107__elements__date2026-03-05T13:07:29+00:00
smart__ValueSet__HIV_C_DE107__elements__publisherWHO
smart__ValueSet__HIV_C_DE107__elements__experimentalTrue

smart__ValueSet__HIV_D_DE186__text__displayHIV clinical stage ValueSet
smart__ValueSet__HIV_D_DE186__link__html<a href="ValueSet-HIV.D.DE186.html">HIV clinical stage ValueSet</a>
smart__ValueSet__HIV_D_DE186__elements__nameHIVDDE186
smart__ValueSet__HIV_D_DE186__elements__titleHIV clinical stage ValueSet
smart__ValueSet__HIV_D_DE186__elements__descriptionValue set of wHO clinical stage of client based on signs and symptoms. WHO clinical staging is a way to categorize HIV disease severity based on new or recurrent clinical events. There are 4 WHO clinical stages that range from mild symptoms (WHO clinical stage 1) to severe symptoms (WHO clinical stage 4).

smart__ValueSet__HIV_D_DE466__text__displayType of treatment-limiting toxicity ValueSet
smart__ValueSet__HIV_D_DE466__link__html<a href="ValueSet-HIV.D.DE466.html">Type of treatment-limiting toxicity ValueSet</a>
smart__ValueSet__HIV_D_DE466__elements__nameHIVDDE466
smart__ValueSet__HIV_D_DE466__elements__titleType of treatment-limiting toxicity ValueSet
smart__ValueSet__HIV_D_DE466__elements__descriptionValue set of type of treatment-limiting toxicity experienced by client. Treatment-limiting toxicity is defined as a serious adverse drug reaction that results in drug discontinuation or substitution. In addition, any reaction that leads to treatment interruption or requires changing the drug or regimen because of an adverse drug reaction is also considered a serious adverse drug reaction.
